title: Flags Hunter
description: A game mode very similar to fallen kingdom
body:
# Flags hunter
A game mode very similar to fallen kingdom

## What is this game mode ? 
It is played 4 team.
Every team has a flag, generated at random position.
They have to defend that flag, or else they won't be able to respawn. 

## How to use this mode :
Every player need to be online. Then the host need to type the command `/yay` to start the game. The mode will then do everything for you

Hope you have fun !
